title: Cactus beneckei
taxonomy: Cactus beneckei is classified as a species within the genus Pachycereus. It belongs to the family Cactaceae and is native to Mexico. This species is often found in the wild, particularly in the states of Baja California and Baja California Sur. Cactus beneckei is known for its cylindrical stem and is typically covered with fine spines. It is often used as an ornamental plant in gardens and greenhouses.
